title: Smoke — bars + markdown
subtitle: Install smoke test. Verifies the bars and markdown renderers.

panels.text:
## bentoclick is alive

If you can read this, the SPA shell loaded `/lib/v1/dash.js` and rendered a markdown panel.

The bar chart below pulls from `system.numbers` for a deterministic shape — no external tables required.

panels.title: Synthetic distribution
panels.query: SELECT toString(number + 1) AS label, (number + 1) * 13 AS value FROM numbers(8)
